pageContext.name: Castle Defence
pageContext.description: Sideshow Art Prints presents the Castle Defence Fine Art Print, a high fantasy art print of mythic proportions by artist Greg Rutkowski.  Perhaps best recognized for his breathtaking contributions to fan-favorite fantasy gaming titles, Greg Rutkowski's prolific career includes a saga of original adventures as well. In Castle Defence, legions of knights mount an armored assault on an invading dragon. The stone keep crumbles beneath the beast's mighty wings as smoke from its flame attacks rises into the sky. Bodies of the slain surround the battlefield, showing the scale of the horrible struggle to protect the stronghold.  Each Castle Defence Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 250 pieces. Available unframed and in a custom framed format, this incredible dragon wall art will be a treasured addition to any collector's fantasy display.  For the good of the realm, bring home the Castle Defence Fine Art Print by Greg Rutkowski today!
